subject: GRB on 20030102 seen by SPI-ACS
body:
The ISDC shift team reports:

A probable GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
2003-01-02 at 23:18:59 UT.
The duration of the burst is 4 sec. No position information is
available.

The light curve is available at:
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-02T23-18-59.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
